meaning: n.<美俚><俗>侦探,家伙,(=dictinary)词典,声明n.<俚>阴茎,鸡巴 Dick 迪克(男子名)
examples: "So Dick gets to sic the FBI on you," Frank grumbled.
As soon as I met Dick, he entranced me because he has a lovely voice.
Think ESPN basketball announcer Dick Vitale or a public address announcer at a professional boxing match.
But this meeting we just came from, as Dick Parsons said, represented trillions of dollars in potential investment.
